name: type_prefix
message: Message must start with valid type prefix: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, test, chore, perf

name: subject_length
message: Subject line must be 72 characters or less

name: body_line_length
message: Body lines should be wrapped at 80 characters

name: dst_ar_required
message: Message must include DST or AR reference

name: imperative_mood
message: Subject should use imperative mood (add, fix, update, etc.)

name: no_period_in_subject
message: Subject line should not end with a period
